subparts.text: Define and plot Unit Step Signal.
Explain difference between causal and non-causal systems.
Obtain Fourier Transform of Unit Impulse Function.
What do you understand by the term signal bandwidth?
Write any two properties of ROC of Laplace Transform.

questions.question_text: Find the convolution of the following signals by graphical method. x = e -3tu, h = u

Define following properties of a continuous time system with simple examples:- Linearity and Non-linearity Time variance and Time invariance. Also, examine the below given systems with respect to above properties. y = sin [x] y = sin t.x
State and prove following properties of Fourier transform. Convolution in time domain Differentiation in time domain Time shifting
Consider a stable LTI System characterized by the differential equation dy/dt + 2y = x. Find its impulse response.
Find the exponential Fourier Series and plot the magnitude and phase spectra of the following triangular waveform:-
Derive relationship between Fourier Transform and Laplace Transform.
Define Nyquist rate. Determine the Nyquist sampling rate and Nyquist sampling interval for the following signals. sinc sinc2 sinc + sinc sinc + 3 sinc2
Using long division method find out the Inverse Z- Transform of 𝑧2+2𝑍 𝑧3−3𝑍2+4𝑍+1 ; ROC |𝑍| > 1
